name: Minky Starshine
description:
Minky Starshine is at heart an additive synthesiser, augmented with possibilities for subtractive synthesis (i.e. filtering) and pulse width modulation.

A waveform is created by summing 16 independently controllable 'partials'. By setting the relative levels of the partials appropriately you can create familiar waveforms such as sawtooth and squarewave, but you can also create an infinite range of timbres in between.

As well as simply setting the levels of the partials, you can flexibly assign them to three 'groups'. Each group has a very flexible envelope generator and an LFO, so you can change the balance of the partials (and therefore the timbre of the sound) over time.

The LFOs have a wide frequency range and can also be used as ring modulators.

The waveform as a whole can have its pulsewidth controlled. An envelope and LFO is provided, as well as control by note velocity.

A resonant filter is available, capable of lowpass, bandpass and highpass and a continuous range in between. Again, control by envelope, LFO and note velocity are possible.

parameters.name: Transpose
parameters.description: Adjusts the tuning in semitones.

parameters.name: Fine tune
parameters.description: Adjusts the tuning in cents.

parameters.name: Bend range
parameters.description: The MIDI pitch bend range.

parameters.name: Sustain mode
parameters.description: The standard polysynth sustain mode parameter.

parameters.name: Sustain
parameters.description: Directly controls the sustain (like a MIDI sustain pedal).

parameters.name: Quality
parameters.description: Sets the quality of the sine wave approximation used for the partials. Low quality uses less CPU.

parameters.name: Gain
parameters.description: Applies an overall output gain.

parameters.name: MIDI channel
parameters.description: The MIDI channel to listen on.

parameters.name: MPE channels
parameters.description: Controls how the algorithm will respond to MPE.

parameters.name: I2C channel
parameters.description: Sets the I2C channel.

parameters.name: Level 1
parameters.description: The amplitude of the first partial (the fundamental).

parameters.name: Level 2
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 2.

parameters.name: Level 3
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 3.

parameters.name: Level 4
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 4.

parameters.name: Level 5
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 5.

parameters.name: Level 6
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 6.

parameters.name: Level 7
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 7.

parameters.name: Level 8
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 8.

parameters.name: Level 9
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 9.

parameters.name: Level 10
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 10.

parameters.name: Level 11
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 11.

parameters.name: Level 12
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 12.

parameters.name: Level 13
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 13.

parameters.name: Level 14
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 14.

parameters.name: Level 15
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 15.

parameters.name: Level 16
parameters.description: The amplitude of partial 16.

parameters.name: Group 1
parameters.description: The group for partial 1. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 2
parameters.description: The group for partial 2. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 3
parameters.description: The group for partial 3. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 4
parameters.description: The group for partial 4. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 5
parameters.description: The group for partial 5. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 6
parameters.description: The group for partial 6. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 7
parameters.description: The group for partial 7. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 8
parameters.description: The group for partial 8. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 9
parameters.description: The group for partial 9. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 10
parameters.description: The group for partial 10. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 11
parameters.description: The group for partial 11. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 12
parameters.description: The group for partial 12. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 13
parameters.description: The group for partial 13. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 14
parameters.description: The group for partial 14. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 15
parameters.description: The group for partial 15. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Group 16
parameters.description: The group for partial 16. Groups 1-3 are affected by envelopes 1-3 and LFOs 1-3 respectively. Group 4 is affected by LFO 4.

parameters.name: Attack
parameters.description: The amplitude envelope attack time.

parameters.name: Decay
parameters.description: The amplitude envelope decay time.

parameters.name: Release
parameters.description: The amplitude envelope release time.

parameters.name: Attack shape
parameters.description: The shape of the attack stage of the amplitude envelope.

parameters.name: Decay shape
parameters.description: The shape of the decay stage of the amplitude envelope.

parameters.name: Release shape
parameters.description: The shape of the release stage of the amplitude envelope.

parameters.name: Sustain
parameters.description: The amplitude envelope sustain level.

parameters.name: Time A1
parameters.description: The time for the first attack stage.

parameters.name: Time A2
parameters.description: The time for the second attack stage.

parameters.name: Time A3
parameters.description: The time for the third attack stage.

parameters.name: Time R1
parameters.description: The time for the first release stage.

parameters.name: Time R2
parameters.description: The time for the second release stage. When set to maximum, release becomes 'Infinite'.

parameters.name: Shape A1
parameters.description: The shape of the A1 stage.

parameters.name: Shape A2
parameters.description: The shape of the A2 stage.

parameters.name: Shape A3
parameters.description: The shape of the A3 stage.

parameters.name: Shape R1
parameters.description: The shape of the R1 stage.

parameters.name: Shape R2
parameters.description: The shape of the R2 stage.

parameters.name: Level A1
parameters.description: The level at the end of the A1 stage.

parameters.name: Level A2
parameters.description: The level at the end of the A2 stage.

parameters.name: Sustain (Group)
parameters.description: The sustain level for group envelopes.

parameters.name: Level R1
parameters.description: The level at the end of the R1 stage.

parameters.name: Speed
parameters.description: The LFO speed. Exponential scale from 0.05Hz to 20Hz.

parameters.name: Offset
parameters.description: The LFO offset – the value around which the LFO oscillates. At 100% this is a normal ‘tremolo’ effect; at 0% the LFO becomes a ring modulator.

parameters.name: Amount
parameters.description: The depth of the LFO around the offset.

parameters.name: KB Track
parameters.description: Keyboard tracking – the amount by which the note pitch affects the LFO speed.

parameters.name: Multiplier
parameters.description: A multiplier for the LFO speed: 1x, 10x, or 100x.

parameters.name: Pulse width
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width.

parameters.name: PW LFO Speed
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width LFO speed. Exponential scale from 0.05Hz to 20Hz.

parameters.name: PW LFO Amount
parameters.description: Sets the amount of pulse width LFO modulation.

parameters.name: PW Env Attack
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width envelope attack time.

parameters.name: PW Env Decay
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width envelope decay time.

parameters.name: PW Env Release
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width envelope release time.

parameters.name: PW Env Sustain
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width envelope sustain level.

parameters.name: PW Env Amount
parameters.description: Sets the pulse width envelope modulation amount.

parameters.name: Cutoff
parameters.description: Sets the filter cutoff frequency. Exponential scale from 50Hz to 12kHz.

parameters.name: Q
parameters.description: Sets the filter resonance.

parameters.name: Type
parameters.description: Sets the filter type. Smoothly transitions from no filter, to lowpass, to bandpass, to highpass, and back to no filter.

parameters.name: LFO Speed
parameters.description: Sets the filter LFO speed. Exponential scale from 0.05Hz to 20Hz.

parameters.name: LFO Amount
parameters.description: Sets the amount of filter LFO modulation.

parameters.name: LFO Type Amount
parameters.description: Sets the amount of filter type LFO modulation.

parameters.name: Env Attack
parameters.description: Sets the filter envelope attack time.

parameters.name: Env Decay
parameters.description: Sets the filter envelope decay time.

parameters.name: Env Release
parameters.description: Sets the filter envelope release time.

parameters.name: Env Sustain
parameters.description: Sets the filter envelope sustain level.

parameters.name: Env Amount
parameters.description: Sets the filter envelope modulation amount.

parameters.name: KB Track
parameters.description: Sets the amount of filter keyboard tracking.

parameters.name: Vel Env Amount
parameters.description: Sets how velocity affects the overall amplitude of the note.

parameters.name: Vel Filter Amount
parameters.description: Sets how velocity affects the filter cutoff.

parameters.name: Vel Filter Env Amount
parameters.description: Sets how velocity affects the depth of the filter envelope.

parameters.name: Vel PW Amount
parameters.description: Sets how velocity affects the pulse width.

parameters.name: Vel PW Env Amount
parameters.description: Sets how velocity affects the depth of the pulse width envelope.

output_ports.name: Left/mono output
output_ports.description: The left or mono output bus.

output_ports.name: Left/mono output
output_ports.description: The left or mono output bus.
